title: Make Aliens Great Again (MAGA) Surges 160% in 24 Hours Despite Low Market Cap Ranking
excerpt: The meme cryptocurrency Make Aliens Great Again (MAGA) has exploded with a massive 159.96% price increase in the past 24 hours, reaching $0.016819. Despite sitting at market cap rank #910, this altcoin's dramatic surge highlights the volatile nature of themed cryptocurrencies in today's market.
